description: You are a Document Management Specialist setting up Nuxeo Platform for a company. Create a structured hierarchy of Sections in the publication area (/default-domain/sections) for organizing published content by department. Under the root Sections area, create a parent Section titled 'Department Publications' with the description 'Central publication area organized by department'. Inside 'Department Publications', create three child Sections: 'Engineering' (Description: 'Published technical documents, specifications, and architecture reviews'), 'Marketing' (Description: 'Published marketing collateral, campaign reports, and brand guidelines'), and 'Legal' (Description: 'Published contracts, compliance documents, and regulatory filings').
